title: pastinaca sativa subsp. divaricata
intro: Pastinaca sativa subsp. divaricata, also known as wild carrot or divaricated wild carrot, is a subspecies of the wild carrot plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils and polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of pastinaca sativa subsp. divaricata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
